data.name: Survival Guide
data.detailed_description:
You play as a construction worker who was peacefully living a modest life with your wife and your tenant. Every morning began the same way - shared breakfasts, casual conversations, and the comfort of routine. You worked hard, paid your bills, and went to sleep knowing tomorrow would be much like today.

Everything changes when you're sent on a business trip. While you're away, an unknown virus spreads at an unimaginable speed, turning people into something no longer human. You rush back home, only to discover that your wife and your tenant are missing.

Will you find and protect the ones you love, no matter the cost?

Can you keep going when hope is all you have left?

Will you find a place you can call your new home?

And possibly... uncover the truth and save the world?

Challenge the new, broken world, search for survivors, and form relationships along the way. Face the dangers of the outbreak, protect what matters and fight for the new beginning.

Survival Guide features an immersive story with high-quality renders, detailed animations, and atmospheric world-building.
data.about_the_game:
You play as a construction worker who was peacefully living a modest life with your wife and your tenant. Every morning began the same way - shared breakfasts, casual conversations, and the comfort of routine. You worked hard, paid your bills, and went to sleep knowing tomorrow would be much like today.

Everything changes when you're sent on a business trip. While you're away, an unknown virus spreads at an unimaginable speed, turning people into something no longer human. You rush back home, only to discover that your wife and your tenant are missing.

Will you find and protect the ones you love, no matter the cost?

Can you keep going when hope is all you have left?

Will you find a place you can call your new home?

And possibly... uncover the truth and save the world?

Challenge the new, broken world, search for survivors, and form relationships along the way. Face the dangers of the outbreak, protect what matters and fight for the new beginning.

Survival Guide features an immersive story with high-quality renders, detailed animations, and atmospheric world-building.
data.short_description: Survival Guide is an adult Visual Novel that blends romance and survival in a world ravaged by a mysterious virus. Will you fight to stay alive, protect those you love, and uncover a way to save humanity? The choice is yours.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible or M1+
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04+
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 compatible
